Body.Content:
Microsoft 365 Copilot Tuning is introducing new templates in Agent Builder, designed for tasks such as drafting complex documents, validating documents against guidelines, and editing to match a distinct writing style. Users with Copilot Tuning enabled can further customize the template-based agents by tuning the context, tools, and underlying models with their organization’s proprietary data, processes, and standards. This empowers your teams with customized agents aligned to how your organization works.

GA date: June CY2026

Preview date: February CY2026

message.Title: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): Customize M365 Copilot for your organization with Copilot Tuning
